night: Still scorching after midnight. Fan and water.

Sweaty sleep confirmed unless you act now. Fan and water.

Night heat is relentless and personal. Your fan agrees.
Still scorching, still midnight, still awful. Ventilate and hydrate.

Still thirty after sunset. Your sweat glands are already aware.

Scorching dark outside, scorching inside. Attack with ventilation.

day: Rain hammering everything outside. Stay in.

Raining like it has a personal grudge. Waterproof everything.

Soaking wet conditions from the start. Dress for water.

day: Snow's coming down hard. Waterproof boots immediately.

day: Sky's throwing a full tantrum outside. Stay the f*ck inside.

day: Can't see sh*t out there. Drive very carefully.
Fog decided today was its day. Your visibility is not.
Thick fog rolling in and staying. Lights on, speed down.
Zero visibility confirmed outside. Zero urgency to go out.
Fog covered everything, dramatically. Slow down.
Can barely see to the end of the street. Use your lights.

Dense fog advisory in effect. Effectively, drive slowly.
Fog taking the day hostage. Ransom: drive slowly.
Visibility nearly zero outside. Make your speed zero-ish too.
Fog settled in thick and eerie today. Careful movement required.
Can't see the road ahead. Slow the f*ck down.
